electronic

OFTG Vision Board - Mid-Year Session

Sat, Jul 4 · 8:00 AM
Sababa
<p><strong><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">This vision board session is all about creating your vision in a way that works for you!</span></strong></p><p>We&#39;ll spend the afternoon reflecting, getting creative, and having meaningful conversations in a relaxed, welcoming space. Whether you&#39;re celebrating your progress, resetting your goals, or simply looking for a fresh perspective, you&#39;ll leave feeling inspired and clearer on what you want for the rest of the year.</p><p>There are no rules when it comes to creating your vision board. You can go for a classic collage, a more structured layout, or go wild and freestyle it. We&#39;ll provide all the materials, inspiration, and guidance, you just need to bring yourself!</p><h2><span style="font-size: 14px;">EVENT DETAILS</span></h2><p>📍 <strong>Location:</strong> Sababa<br>📅 <strong>Date &amp; Time:</strong> Saturday 4 July | 3:00-6:00 PM<br>🎟 <strong>Price:</strong> 1,200/1300 THB per person<br>🖍 <strong>What&#39;s Included:</strong> All materials, guided prompts, creative support, and a complimentary glass of wine (or a mocktail if you&#39;re not drinking).</p>
